encounter.reason: Prior authorization status update for Hadlima (adalimumab-bwwd), continued rheumatoid arthritis management
encounter.location: South Texas Rheumatology, San Antonio, TX

medications.name: naproxen 500 mg oral tablet
medications.reason: seropositive rheumatoid arthritis — symptomatic pain/inflammation control

document_references.description: Documents a telephone call from Dr. Fuentes's office to patient regarding the status of the Aetna prior authorization for Hadlima (adalimumab-bwwd). The prior authorization remains under review; supplemental documentation including imaging reports and full medication history was submitted in October 2022. Patient reports stable but unimproved symptoms, tolerating current medications without side effects. Plan is to continue current regimen and follow up on prior authorization, with next office visit in March 2023 or sooner if authorization is obtained.
